nl_query: Count blocked scripts per block reason category.
failed_sql:
SELECT b.block_status, b.block_reason, COUNT(*) AS script_count
FROM   answer_script a
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = a.id
JOIN   script_hold sh ON sh.script_id = a.id
JOIN   board b ON b.id = a.course_id AND b.exam_id = a.exam_id
WHERE  sh.is_active = TRUE
GROUP  BY b.block_status, b.block_reason
ORDER  BY script_count DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): board.block_status, board.block_reason, board.block_status, board.block_reason. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
